## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] Refactor / chore / build / ci
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, and `npm run format:check` pass
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Docs updated (ran `npm run docs:generate` if a CLI command or MCP tool changed)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
